metadata.title: Women First Account | Women’s Banking | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: To facilitate women through access to financial services and products, Meezan Bank is pleased to offer Meezan Women First Account – a dedicated bank account exclusively offered to Resident Pakistani women.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Women First Account Women First Consumer Finance Women Entrepreneurs If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Meezan Women First Account Banking For Women - The Right Way! To facilitate women through access to financial services and products, Meezan Bank is pleased to offer Women First Account - a dedicated bank account exclusively offered to Resident Pakistani women. Designed to completely fulfil the banking needs of women, Women First Account enables fast and convenient day-to-day transactions directly from the account and comes with a customized vertical debit card, chequebook, free/discounted banking services and lucrative discounts on exclusively curated brands and products. Women First Account is offered in savings category and can be opened in both PKR or foreign currencies (USD/GBP & EURO). Key Features & Benefits Customized Vertical Debit Card* - 1st issuance of debit card on discounted pricing. Mudarabah-based Savings Account - A savings account with higher expected returns Personalized Chequebook - Issuance of chequebook in accordance with the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Free Pay Orders - Free issuance of pay orders Free internet and mobile banking services - Avail free mobile banking services Free e-statement facility - Receive e-statement of all banking transactions on your registered email address Minimum Investment - Minimum investment required for account opening is 100 PKR/USD/GBP/EURO Online Branch Banking - Avail online branch banking facilities all across Pakistan Monthly Profit Payment - Profit payment made in account on a monthly basis Withdrawals - No restriction on withdrawals or number of transactions Minimum Balance - No minimum balance requirement No Deductions - No deduction of service charges if the balance maintained is low Discount on Locker Fee - Fifty percent discount on first year locker fee (subject to availability) No Processing Fee - Fully waived off processing charges of Housing Finance, Car Ijarah & Apni Bike cases Waiver of Early Termination Profit Fully waived off early termination profit on Car Ijarah cases For Easy Home, fifty percent discount on profit due to early termination/early unit purchase (Musharakah buyout) Discounted Monthly Payments/Rentals - Exclusive discounted profit rates on consumer financing Attractive Saving Plans - Special high yielding savings/investment planning options *Charges will be applicable as per the Bank’s Schedule of Charges (SOC), however, first year special pricing is applicable on Meezan Women First Visa Debit Card only. Meezan Women First Debit Card Customized Vertical Debit Card Access your account anytime, anywhere conveniently with your Women First Debit Card! Your First Debit Card offers you unparalleled convenience. Unlock a suite of exclusive discounts, benefits and privileges designed specifically to complement your preferences. Learn More How Does Women First Account Work? Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Women First Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio PKR Savings Account Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Women First Account (PKR) Monthly 0.45 Women First Account (USD) Monthly 0.58 Women First Account (GBP) Monthly 0.27 Women First Account (Euro) Monthly 0.27 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Women First Account PKR Monthly 6.34% Women First Account USD Monthly 2.00% Women First Account GBP Monthly 1.25% Women First Account EUR Monthly 0.97% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) Want to Open Women First Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Get Contacted by Our Representative! the form below and you'll be guided about how you can open your new account. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
